title: reiner2009's hyper realistic sky
description: Bring the real world into Minecraft! This resource pack replaces the default Minecraft sky with real photographs of the sky, captured from a mountain top. The result is a highly realistic skybox with natural clouds, sunsets, and starry nights.
body:
Bring the real world into Minecraft!

This resource pack replaces the default Minecraft sky with real photographs of the sky, captured from a mountain top. The result is a highly realistic skybox with natural clouds, sunsets, and starry nights.





✨ Features

- 📸 Real photos of the sky used for the textures
- 🌞 Bright daytime skies with realistic clouds
- 🌅 Smooth transitions into a glowing sunset
- 🌌 A starry night sky with natural cloud silhouettes  and northern lights in the sky
- 🔄 Dynamic day/night cycle (fade-in and fade-out effects)
- ⚡ Optimized for Skyboxify / OptiFine Sky system

![Norten Lights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a99db4d3235fa1abe2949d7d4c9fa778b88bb628.webp)


🛠️ Requirements

- Minecraft Java Edition
- [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify) or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) (to render custom skies)


📂 Installation

1. Download the zipfile.
2. Place it in yourresourcepacks/folder.
3. Enable it in the Minecraft settings. Make sure Skyboxify (or OptiFine) is installed and custom sky is enabled.


Final word

I am very happy about every download.
For suggestions for improvement or bugs, you can write in the comments.
